common.check_mfa_bind: MFA binding and enablement are required
common.check_password_reset: Password must be changed before continuing
auth.invalid_captcha: Captcha is invalid or expired, please refresh and try again
auth.token_invalid: Invalid login token, please login again
auth.admin_login_ip_changed: Login environment has changed, please login again
auth.admin_ip_not_allowed: Current IP is not allowed, please contact the administrator
auth.mfa_required: MFA information has expired, please verify again
auth.mfa_expired: MFA verification has expired, please verify again
auth.mfa_force_enabled_disallow_disable: MFA is enforced. Disabling MFA is not allowed.
auth.password_reset_required: Password must be changed before continuing
auth.replay_attack: Request has expired, please do not repeat submit
auth.need_login: Not logged in or session expired
config.version_conflict: Configuration was modified by another user. Please refresh and try again.
task.run_success: Task is scheduled to run immediately
task.registry.type.default.hint: Verify the backend has registered valid payload parsing logic before enqueueing this task type.
task.registry.type.workflow_trigger.desc: Workflow trigger entry task, enqueued automatically when the console starts a workflow
task.registry.type.workflow_trigger.hint: Do not enqueue this type directly in most cases. Use the manual workflow trigger form first.
task.registry.type.workflow_noop.desc: Workflow noop node task, used only to finalize DAGs and link dependencies
task.registry.type.workflow_noop.hint: Internal workflow use only. Manual enqueue has no business effect.
task.registry.type.cache_refresh_request: Cache refresh request task that aggregates repeated refresh requests within a short window
Use for small cache target refreshes. Set payload.targets to a cache target array.
task.registry.type.cache_refresh_batch.d: Cache refresh batch task that executes the actual cache refresh
task.registry.type.cache_refresh_batch.h: Usually generated by the aggregator automatically. Manual direct enqueue is not recommended.
task.registry.type.archive_execute.desc: Generic archive execution task that writes historical tables in batches by range, verifies results, and deletes hot-table rows
task.registry.type.archive_execute.hint: Prefer the archive workflow. Direct enqueue is only for troubleshooting or catch-up.
task.registry.type.daily_summary.desc: Periodic task and workflow daily report task that summarizes the previous 24 hours and sends a Lark notification
task.registry.type.daily_summary.hint: Prefer the task_report.daily_summary periodic task. It summarizes the previous 24 hours by default; manual enqueue can pass RFC3339 windowStart/windowEnd to override the window.
task.registry.type.admin_export.desc: Async admin-list export task that generates Excel and writes progress back
task.registry.type.admin_export.hint: Prefer the export entry on the admin list page. Manual enqueue must provide jobId, operatorId, and request.
task.registry.type.user_export.desc: Async front-user export task that generates Excel with masked contact fields and writes progress back
task.registry.type.user_export.hint: Prefer the export entry on the user list page. Manual enqueue must provide jobId, operatorId, and request; split-table mode still follows identity-index boundaries.
task.registry.type.user_tag.desc: User tag workflow node task for rebuild, recalculation, and sync
task.registry.type.user_tag.hint: Usually scheduled inside user tag workflow nodes. Direct enqueue outside a workflow is not recommended.
task.registry.workflow.default.hint: Verify the targets and default queue match the current environment before triggering.
task.registry.workflow.cache_refresh.hin: Use for target-list cache refreshes. targets can contain cache targets or cache keys populated by the page.
task.registry.workflow.archive_run.hint: Run hot-table archive batches during off-peak hours. targets can contain archive task names such as admin_log.
task.registry.workflow.daily_summary.hin: Usually triggered periodically. Sends the task daily report for the previous 24 hours by default; manual trigger can override the window.
task.registry.workflow.user_tag_full.hin: Daily full rebuild flow. Run during off-peak hours to avoid overlapping with routine recalculation tasks.
task.registry.workflow.user_tag_delta.hi: Routine incremental user-tag refresh. Usually no targets are required.
task.registry.workflow.user_tag_targeted: Recalculate specified users. targets must include uid values; multi-dimension filter hashes are not allowed as calculation sources.
task.registry.workflow.user_tag_recalcul: Full user-tag recalculation by tag type workflow
Fully recalculate by tag type. Include tagType or an execution marker in targets.
task.registry.workflow.user_tag_runtime_: User-tag runtime helper table cleanup workflow
Opportunistic cleanup for user-tag runtime helper tables. Usually triggered periodically and requires no targets.
task.registry.workflow.user_tag_outbox_r: Periodically scans and republishes abnormal user-tag event outbox rows. Usually triggered periodically and requires no targets.
task.report.retention_warning: completed_retention_seconds is not greater than the report window. Successful tasks may be cleaned by Asynq at the report boundary; set it to at least 90000 seconds.
hot_reload.fingerprint_init_failed: Failed to initialize config file fingerprint
hot_reload.fingerprint_read_failed: Failed to read config file fingerprint
hot_reload.file_status_read_failed: Failed to read config file status
hot_reload.not_bound: Config hot reload has no bound file
hot_reload.runtime_config_load_failed: Failed to load database runtime config
hot_reload.success_restart: Config hot reload succeeded. Restart-required settings remain at current runtime values.
hot_reload.watcher_not_started: Hot reload watcher has not started
scheduler.task_disabled: Task queue is disabled; scheduler is not started
scheduler.no_periodic_task: No enabled periodic task is configured
scheduler.already_running: Scheduler is already running and waiting for leader status changes
scheduler.leader_released: Scheduler released leader and is waiting to compete again
scheduler.backlog_exceeded: Periodic task queue backlog exceeded the threshold
api_runtime.not_configured: API internal runtime is not configured
api_runtime.user_create_no_cache: New user has no existing runtime cache
api_runtime.profile_unchanged: Profile unchanged; API runtime sync is not needed
api_runtime.status_unchanged: Status unchanged; API runtime sync is not needed
api_runtime.profile_sync_warning: Profile updated, but API profile cache sync failed. Please retry manually.
api_runtime.status_sync_warning: Status updated, but API profile cache sync failed. Please retry manually.
collector.run_partial_failed: Some failed events still failed in this ledger retry cycle and were written back by retry policy
admin_export.file_expired: Export file is missing or expired. Please export again.
user_export.file_expired: User export file is missing or expired. Please export again.
user_tag.lease_release_success: User tag workflow mutex lease released
user_tag.lease_release_fail: Failed to release user tag workflow mutex lease
user_tag.lease_not_found: User tag workflow mutex lease does not exist or has already been released
user_tag.lease_owner_mismatch: User tag workflow mutex lease owner does not match. Check workflowId and mode.
